title: GEMgluPerspective
description: set up a perspective projection matrix

messages.description: Specifies the field of view angle, in degrees, in the y direction.
Specifies the aspect ratio that determines the field of view in the x direction. The aspect ratio is the ratio of x (width) to y
Specifies the distance from the viewer to the near clipping plane (always positive).
Specifies the distance from the viewer to the far clipping plane (always positive).

arguments.description: Specifies the field of view angle, in degrees, in the y direction.
Specifies the aspect ratio that determines the field of view in the x direction. The aspect ratio is the ratio of x (width) to y
Specifies the distance from the viewer to the near clipping plane (always positive).
Specifies the distance from the viewer to the far clipping plane (always positive).
